title: 5th Pass Jobs 2026 – Chowkidar, Accountant cum clerk and More
org: Chowkidar, Accountant cum clerk and More
shortInfo: Government General Hospital Guntur (GGH Guntur) Recruitment 2026 for 5 posts of Various Posts in Chowkidar, Accountant cum clerk and More. Candidates Can Apply Offline. The offline application starts on 21-05-2026, and closes on 29-05-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through GGH Guntur official website.

basic_details.job_title: GGH Guntur Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Chowkidar, Accountant cum clerk and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Chowkidar, Accountant cum clerk and More
basic_details.short_information: Government General Hospital Guntur (GGH Guntur) Recruitment 2026 for 5 posts of Various Posts in Chowkidar, Accountant cum clerk and More. Candidates Can Apply Offline. The offline application starts on 21-05-2026, and closes on 29-05-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through GGH Guntur official website.

application_fee.details: Maximum Age Limit: 42 years. Age Relaxation: SC, ST, BC and EWS: 5 years; Ex-service Men: 3 years in addition to length of service; Differently abled: 10 years.

age_limit.details: Candidates should download and read the GGH Guntur Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below.

qualification.details: Accountant cum clerk: Graduate with knowledge of accounts and working knowledge of computers. Peer Educator: Should be literate, Ex-drug user with 1-2 yrs of sobriety, willing to work among drug using population and having communication skills. Agrees to refrain from using, buying or selling drugs; Ready to work for the prevention of harmful drug use and relapse. Chowkidar: Must be passed Vth class, must be able to ride a bicycle or Motor Cycle. House Keeping work: Must be able to read and write in Telugu.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Chowkidar, Accountant cum clerk and More

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://guntur.ap.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 29-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the GGH Guntur recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the GGH Guntur Various Posts recruitment is 29th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this date.

faq.question: What is the educational qualification required for the Accountant cum clerk post?
faq.answer: For the Accountant cum clerk position, candidates must be graduates with a good knowledge of accounts and possess working knowledge of computers. This ensures they can handle financial tasks efficiently.

faq.question: Are there any age relaxations for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided. SC, ST, BC, and EWS candidates get a 5-year relaxation. Ex-service men receive a 3-year relaxation, and differently-abled individuals get a 10-year relaxation.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for these posts?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs.9,000/- to Rs.12,000/-. This is a contractual position, and the salary is fixed within this range.

faq.question: How will candidates be selected for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process is based on merit. Candidates will be evaluated based on their aggregate marks in the qualifying examination (90%) and a weightage for the years since passing the examination (up to 10 marks).

faq.question: What is the application fee for GGH Guntur recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee varies by category. General and OBC candidates need to pay Rs.300/-, while SC/ST candidates need to pay Rs.100/-. Persons with Benchmark Disabilities (PwBD) are exempted from the fee.

faq.question: What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the GGH Guntur Various Posts recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it, and send it via post to the specified address.

faq.question: What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies announced for Various Posts in Drug De-Addiction Centers at Government General Hospital Guntur. These vacancies are distributed across different roles.

faq.question: What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions advertised by Government General Hospital Guntur are on a contractual basis. This means the employment is for a fixed term as per the terms of the contract.

faq.question: Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Government General Hospital Guntur, which is https://guntur.ap.gov.in. Ensure you download the correct documents.
